termsAndServices.title: Introduction
termsAndServices.content: Welcome to Chirp, a dynamic platform designed to *connect* you with the world in real time. By accessing or using Chirp, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and services. These terms govern your use of our platform and are designed to ensure a *safe* and enjoyable experience for all users. Please read them carefully. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use Chirp.

termsAndServices.title: User Responsibilities
termsAndServices.content: As a Chirp user, you are *responsible* for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to provide *accurate* and current information about yourself as prompted by the registration process and to update this information as necessary to keep it accurate and complete. You must not share your account credentials with anyone or allow others to access your account. Any activity that occurs under your account is your responsibility. Chirp is not liable for any *loss* or damage arising from your failure to comply with these obligations.

termsAndServices.title: Content and Conduct
termsAndServices.content: Chirp provides a platform for you to share content, including text, images, videos, and links, with other users. By posting content on Chirp, you grant us a *worldwide*, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, publish, and distribute such content in any media. You agree that you will not post content that is *illegal*, harmful, abusive, defamatory, or otherwise objectionable. Chirp reserves the right to remove any content that violates these terms or is otherwise deemed inappropriate at our sole discretion. Repeated violations may result in the *suspension* or termination of your account.

termsAndServices.title: Privacy Policy
termsAndServices.content: Your *privacy* is important to us at Chirp. We are committed to protecting your personal information and ensuring that it is handled with care. Our Privacy Policy outlines the types of information we collect, how we use it, and the measures we take to protect it. By using Chirp, you consent to the collection and use of your information as described in our Privacy Policy. We will never share your *personal information* with third parties without your consent, except as required by law or as necessary to provide the services you have requested.

termsAndServices.title: Termination of Service
termsAndServices.content: Chirp reserves the right to *terminate* or suspend your access to the platform at any time, with or without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these terms or is harmful to other users, Chirp, or third parties. If your account is terminated, you may lose access to any content or data associated with your account. Chirp is not responsible for any loss of *data* or content resulting from the termination of your account. If you wish to terminate your account voluntarily, you may do so by following the instructions on the Chirp platform.

termsAndServices.title: Limitation of Liability
termsAndServices.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chirp, its affiliates, and their respective officers, directors, employees, and agents shall not be *liable* for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, or any loss of data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use Chirp. This limitation of *liability* applies regardless of the legal theory under which such damages are sought.

termsAndServices.title: Premium Version Terms
termsAndServices.content: The Premium version of Chirp includes the following features: *Half Ads* in For You and Following, *Larger reply boost*, *Get paid to post*, *Checkmark*, and *Creator Subscription*. By subscribing to Premium, you agree to these additional terms and acknowledge that the features provided are subject to change. Chirp reserves the right to modify or discontinue Premium features at any time without notice. Any changes will be communicated to you, and your continued use of the Premium service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

termsAndServices.title: Premium+ Version Terms
termsAndServices.content: The Premium+ version of Chirp includes all features of Premium, plus: *No Ads* in For You and Following, *Largest reply boost*, *Chirps Pro*, *Analytics*, *Media Studio*, and *Write articles*. By subscribing to Premium+, you agree to these additional terms and acknowledge that the features provided are subject to change. Chirp reserves the right to modify or discontinue Premium+ features at any time without notice. Any changes will be communicated to you, and your continued use of the Premium+ service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
